content.en:
"That's a good task!"

Ye Tian looked at one of the tasks on the task list of the Nine Buildings and muttered.

These tasks are all tasks suitable for the Eightfold Origin Ancestor to do, and what he values is the task of killing the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor, the peak powerhouse of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

The Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor was the peak powerhouse of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and he also condensed the existence of the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and he condensed the Sevenfold Life Dao Flower at the time of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

Although the Sevenfold Life Dao Flower is very ordinary, at least it has the Life Dao Flower, which is much stronger than those Dao Ancestors who don't have the Life Dao Flower.

Moreover, in order to have the hope of advancing to the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor deliberately suppressed his Yuan Dao Dao Flower and only condensed the Sevenfold Yuan Dao Dao Words.

Although doing so will reduce one's combat effectiveness, there is a glimmer of hope for achieving the Ninefold Origin Ancestor in the future, even if it is the weakest achievement of the Ninefold Ancestor, it is also the Ninefold Ancestor!

According to the information of the Nine-Fold Building, the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor had a very strong will, except for the Sevenfold Life Dao Flower and the Sevenfold Yuan Dao Flower, but he did not reach the immeasurable will.

In addition, whether the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor had comprehended the Infinite Dao Prototype or not, it was not very clear, and it was very likely that he had not yet comprehended the Infinite Dao Prototype.

The reason why Jiuzhonglou wanted to kill the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor was naturally because the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor offended the Jiuchong Building, and his strength was weak, and the Jiuzhong Building was not so eager to kill him, so he let him live until now.

At present, the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor has hid in an ancient nest, and that ancient nest only allows the Eightfold Origin Ancestor to enter, plus he is good at escaping, and his ability to save his life is not weak.

The Yae Ancestor, who had the ability to kill him, couldn't look down on this point, and the Yae Ancestor who could afford to kill him couldn't kill him.

Ye Tian happened to lack points, so he wanted to take this task.

"500,000 points, although it's not much, but it's okay!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he took this task, and then went to the ancient nest where the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor was located, the Fengyang Ancient Nest.

......

Wind and Sun Ancient Nest.

This ancient nest is very large, and there are many original antiquities, and many Yae ancestors like to come to this ancient nest.

And somewhere in the mountain range of the Fengyang Ancient Nest, there is a small space here, this space is very special, even the Yae Origin Ancestor is difficult to find here.

This is one of the many strongholds of the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor, and even if it is discovered, the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor can calmly leave.

"Recently, it seems that there is no Dao Ancestor in the Nine-Layer Building to chase and kill me, I wonder if the Nine-Story Building has revoked this mission?"

Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor muttered.

He didn't want to offend the Nine-Folded Building, but he just plundered a treasure under the command of the Nine-Folded Building, and as a result, the Nine-Folded Building blacklisted him, and even issued a mission to kill him.

Fortunately, he got the news and fled here as soon as possible, otherwise he would have died a long time ago!

Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor cultivated here honestly, although his cultivation speed was slow and he lacked resources, as long as he did not fall, he firmly believed that he had the hope of becoming a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor in the future, or even a Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

Even if it is the weakest Ninefold Ancestor, it has a very high status, and if he casually takes refuge in a top power, the Ninefold Building will not dare to deal with himself.

Even if he only needs to become a half-step Ninefold Ancestor, a top power like Shidao Mountain may be able to accept him.

However, it was too difficult to become a half-step Ninefold Ancestor!

Not to mention that he now lacks resources, which makes it even more difficult.

......

"This is the Fengyang Ancient Nest, it's really extraordinary!"

Ye Tian came to this ancient nest and muttered.

According to the information of the Nine-Story Building, this Fengyang Ancient Nest is second only to the super-large Ancient Nest, and the life limit that it can accommodate is the peak realm of the Eightfold Ancestral Ancestor.

In this ancient nest, Ye Tian felt that with his current strength, he was almost invincible.

Next, he only needed to find the Blood Demon Dao Ancestor.

With his copying talent and immeasurable will, the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor would definitely not be able to evade his detection.

Next, Ye Tian continued to look for traces of the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor in the Fengyang Ancient Nest.

Along the way, all the original antiquities that stood in his way were easily erased by him.

Finally, Ye Tian discovered the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor.

"Here it is!"

Ye Tian's immeasurable will passed through a small layer of space and found an eightfold primordial ancestor peak Dao Ancestor, and under the prying eyes of the copying talent, the identity of this Dao Ancestor was revealed, and it was the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor.

So, Ye Tian hit it and directly smashed this small space.

Rumble!!!

The small space was shattered with a single blow, and the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor understood that he had been discovered.

In an instant, the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor sensed Ye Tian outside.

"The early stage of the Yae Ancestor?"

The Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor was stunned, and he dared to kill him even with this cultivation?

However, the next moment, he was directly stunned!

Rumble!!!!

The immeasurable will and the immeasurable Dao prototype burst out from Ye Tian's body, although it could not form the Immeasurable Dao Domain, but it could form a type of pseudo-Immeasurable Dao Domain, which still brought great coercion to the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor.

"How is it possible, a Dao Ancestor in the early stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor actually comprehended the Infinite Dao Prototype and condensed the Infinite Will!!!"

The Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor was dumbfounded.

You must know that he has been at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor for countless years, and he still hasn't comprehended the immeasurable Dao rudiment, nor has he condensed the immeasurable will!

Moreover, he also knew that this kind of demon was absolutely condensed with the Ninefold Life Dao Flower and the Ninefold Yuan Dao Flower, and the combat power of the same level was extremely terrifying.

"Run!"

The Blood Demon Dao Ancestor knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, so he had to flee.

However, the gap between him and Ye Tian was too great, and he overestimated his ability to escape.

"Yuan Dun is extremely fast!"

Ye Tian instantly caught up with the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor, fighting in close quarters, and striking the endless golden spear with one blow, instantly penetrating the multiple defenses of the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor.

Burst!!!

The Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor was pierced by a blow, and the rhythm of his escape was interrupted.

Next, Ye Tian attacked again and again, so that the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor had no power to resist at all, and the heavy imprisonment Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu was also urged by Ye Tian, and under the layers of suppression, the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor's escape methods were meaningless no matter how subtle they were.

It didn't take long for another blow to blow the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor to finally be killed.

"I can kill an Yae Ancestor now!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

However, his current strength is still a little worse than the half-step Ninefold Ancestor, and when he comprehends the true Immeasurable Dao, it will be comparable to the Half-Step Ninefold Ancestor.

After killing the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian brought the remnants of the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor back to hand in the mission.

Soon after, the task was completed, and Ye Tian gained 500,000 points.

And Ye Tian killed the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor, which was also known by the upper echelons of the Nine-Story Building.

Suddenly, some high-level executives were extremely shocked.

After all, they knew that Ye Tian's cultivation was only in the early stage of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and as a result, they would be able to kill the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor!

When you reach the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm, it is very difficult to fight beyond the level, unless it is to torture and kill those very weak Eightfold Origin Ancestors, but the Blood Ghost Dao Ancestor is not the kind of spicy chicken Dao Ancestor, but also a Dao Ancestor who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao!

However, this news was blocked by the upper echelons of the Nine-Story Building, so the other forces did not know Ye Tian's specific combat power.
